posts.title: "@astro-minimax/ai Module Technical Architecture Deep Dive"
posts.summary: The article explains the vendor-agnostic architecture of the @astro-minimax/ai module, detailing its layered RAG pipeline, multi-provider failover, build-runtime separation, and graceful degradation to deliver low-latency, resilient blog AI interactions.
keyPoints: Supports global chat and article companion modes.
Uses SSE streaming and RAG for fast responses.
Retrieval pipeline combines TF-IDF and reranking.
Provider Manager enables failover and health tracking.
Build-time preprocessing reduces runtime latency.
Fallbacks cover provider, retrieval, and analysis failures.

posts.title: Settings Panel & Preferences
posts.summary: The article introduces astro-minimax’s settings panel, explaining how to adjust appearance, reading, layout, and general preferences, then save, share, reset, and automatically restore them for a personalized blog experience.
keyPoints: The panel opens from the bottom-right gear icon.
Preferences cover appearance, reading, layout, and UI toggles.
Reading options include theme, width, line height, and font family.
AI chat panel supports Small, Medium, and Large sizes.
Settings persist in localStorage and restore on revisit.
Share exports preferences as URL parameters; Reset restores defaults.

posts.title: "@astro-minimax/ai 模块技术架构详解"
posts.summary: 文章详解 @astro-minimax/ai 的分层技术架构，围绕 RAG 流水线、多供应商抽象、流式响应与降级容错设计展开，说明其如何在博客场景中实现低延迟、高可用且可扩展的 AI 交互能力。
keyPoints: 模块面向全局对话与阅读伴侣场景
采用 Streaming、SSE 与 RAG 组合
Provider Manager实现多供应商切换
检索链路含缓存、TF-IDF与可选重排
智能分析含关键词提取与引用守卫
三层提示构建提升复用与动态适配

posts.title: 设置面板与偏好设置
posts.summary: 文章介绍 astro-minimax 的设置面板使用方式，说明外观、阅读、布局与通用偏好的配置项，以及通过 localStorage 持久化和 URL 参数分享设置的实现效果。
keyPoints: 设置面板入口位于右下角齿轮图标
支持外观、阅读、布局和通用偏好
阅读配置覆盖字号、行高、宽度与字体
AI 聊天面板支持 S/M/L 三档宽度
设置可持久化到 localStorage 自动恢复
当前偏好可通过 URL 参数分享

posts.title: How to update dependencies of astro-minimax
posts.summary: The article explains how to update astro-minimax dependencies and template safely using pnpm, npm-check-updates, and Git workflows, helping users stay current while reducing breakage risk.
keyPoints: pnpm provides the fastest package update path.
npm-check-updates enables staged patch, minor, major upgrades.
Major version bumps require careful release note review.
Template users should preserve customized content and config files.
Git remote pull can sync upstream template changes.
Merge conflicts and unrelated histories are key update pitfalls.

posts.title: 如何更新 astro-minimax 的依赖
posts.summary: 文章介绍更新 astro-minimax 依赖与模板的实用流程：CLI 用户可直接用 pnpm 更新，模板用户可借助 npm-check-updates 分层升级并用 Git 合并模板，从而更稳妥地保持项目最新。
keyPoints: CLI 集成可直接用 pnpm 更新包
npm-check-updates 适合批量检查依赖
依赖升级应按 patch、minor、major 分层进行
模板更新需保留内容与配置目录
可通过 Git 远程拉取上游模板并解决冲突
主版本升级和模板合并后必须完整测试
